problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
